fixes_applied: stripped 3 scratch files from canonical patch (data-pipeline/artifacts_pi-mono/canonical_patches/c3f74ad9-f358-40e5-bd43-7ffeec60f1e3.json): top-level index.js (18 lines), top-level index.ts (17 lines), and a package.json rewrite (4+/45-) that gutted the pi-monorepo workspace declaration into a tiny 'test-write-error-extension' shape
updated patch JSON files_changed, numstat, files_changed_count, total_additions, total_deletions to reflect the kept files (CHANGELOG.md + tool-execution.ts)
added _curator_notes annotation to canonical patch JSON
notes: Real fix is the 8-line addition to packages/coding-agent/src/modes/interactive/components/tool-execution.ts (renders error text via theme.fg('error', ...) when this.result?.isError) plus a 4-line CHANGELOG entry — kept both. F2P stays empty because the fix lives in TUI rendering code which the existing vitest suite does not exercise; test_cmd `bun x vitest run` falls back to overall-pass-rate. Adding an F2P would require shipping a new test that mocks the ToolExecutionComponent's render path, beyond patch-noise-strip scope. Patch stripping unblocks the buggy-state synthesis (would otherwise destroy the workspaces config and break every other package's build).
